judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the four illustrations and the circle diagram, but Description B adds specific caption text ('SAIL 'EM BACK AND FORTH', etc.) that Description A omits without contradiction.
original_image_tags: Line drawing of two men tossing a disc back and forth.
Line drawing of a man throwing a disc that curves.
Line drawing of a man throwing a disc that curves back to him. A "WIND" arrow points left.
Line drawing of a man skipping a disc off the ground labeled "HARD SURFACE".

Diagram showing four circles labeled A, B, C, and D arranged in a horizontal line. There is a label "18 FT" between circle A and circle B, and "30 FT" between circle B and circle C. There is a label "18 FT" between circle C and circle D.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned instructional flyer page with cartoon illustrations of a flying saucer game, including multiple small drawings of people throwing a saucer, dashed flight paths, and a lower diagram labeled “THE GAME OF HECKLE” showing four circles labeled A, B, C, and D connected by distances marked 18 ft and 30 ft.*
